title: Raiguri better POTR
description: Changes the textures of the Pollution of the Realms mod to be more esthetically friendly
body:
### Raiguri's better Pollution of the Realms RP
I just don't like default models and textures of the [POTR](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pollution-of-the-realms), so thats why I made this RP.

![aboba](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BqIuonip/images/1806b104760223a5901d936390b4588ab8f3c59b.png)

***Please check images section to see how looks other models.***

<sub>I will make aerometer new model in near future.</sub>
